bibliography: Binance Spot API market data endpoint documentation and market-data-only FAQ.
claim: Binance spot public market data can describe a diagnostic crypto kline adapter without credentials or order placement.
evidence: Binance documents spot market data endpoints including /api/v3/klines and a market-data-only host for public market data.
limitations: Documentation and endpoint behavior can change; downloaded market data is not redistributed by this repo; klines do not prove executable fills.
tradable_implication: None. This descriptor can support data-boundary checks only.
required_tests: Provider terms are reviewed before research promotion
Archived replayable data is available before any paper candidate verdict
failure_modes: Live endpoint data treated as deterministic historical evidence
Kline bars mistaken for executable fills
Provider terms or redistribution rights assumed instead of reviewed
system_requirements: Capture receive time in any future collector
